howItWorks.intro: This hotel vs airbnb calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Hotel Total = (Nightly Rate x Nights) x (1 + Tax Rate %)
Airbnb Total = (Nightly Rate x Nights) + Cleaning Fee + Service Fee
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: Is Airbnb really cheaper than hotels?
faq.answer: It depends on length of stay. Airbnb cleaning fees are fixed, so short stays (1-2 nights) often cost more than hotels. For 5+ nights, Airbnb is typically 20-40% cheaper, especially for groups who can split a whole-home rental.

faq.question: What hidden fees should I watch for?
faq.answer: Hotels: resort fees ($25-50/night), parking ($20-40/night), WiFi. Airbnb: cleaning fees ($50-200), service fees (14%), extra guest fees, and checkout chores. Always compare total cost, not just nightly rate.

faq.question: Is the Hotel vs Airbnb Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard travel planning formulas trusted by travelers. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What number of nights should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate number of nights value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Hotel vs Airbnb Calculator?
sections.body: The Hotel vs Airbnb Calculator is a free online tool designed for travelers who need quick, accurate calculations in the travel planning space. By entering your number of nights, hotel nightly rate, hotel tax rate, you get instant results including hotel total cost, airbnb total cost, savings. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting hotel total cost right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In travel planning, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by travelers worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to plan your trips with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your number of nights and need to find the right hotel total cost. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Number of Nights
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your number of nights — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: hotel nightly rate, hotel tax rate, airbnb nightly rate, airbnb cleaning fee, airbnb service fee. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your hotel total cost, airbnb total cost, savings. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your number of nights before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both hotel total cost and airbnb total cost — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to plan your trips.
If you're unsure about your airbnb service fee, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
